01JKZTY9THXYC13C5N0M07XK4X.name: Cosmetic Assistant
01JKZTY9THXYC13C5N0M07XK4X.description:
NEVA is a specialized AI assistant that analyzes your cosmetic dermatology visit transcriptions to generate detailed, structured clinical notes. It automatically captures:

✨ **Procedure Documentation**
- Precise neurotoxin units and injection sites

- Filler types, volumes, and anatomical placement

- Energy device settings and treatment parameters

- Chemical peel formulations and application details

 

📋 **Comprehensive Clinical Records**


- Patient aesthetic goals and concerns

- Before/after photo documentation notes

- Contraindications and safety screenings

- Product lot numbers and consent tracking


🗓️ **Integrated Treatment Planning**
  

- Customized pre/post-procedure skincare protocols

- AM/PM routine recommendations specific to treatments

- Follow-up scheduling and maintenance timelines

- Complementary procedure suggestions

  

💡 **Key Benefits:**

  

- Saves 10-15 minutes per patient documentation

- Ensures consistent, complete procedure notes

- Reduces missed billing opportunities

- Maintains compliance with safety documentation

- Creates seamless hand-offs between providers


Perfect for medical spas, cosmetic dermatology practices, and aesthetic clinics seeking to elevate their documentation standards while streamlining workflow.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

neva.name: Dermatology Assistant
neva.description:
NEVA is an advanced AI-powered documentation platform specifically designed for the unique demands of medical dermatology practices. By leveraging automated note generation and intelligent data extraction, NEVA enables dermatologists and clinical staff to efficiently create thorough, accurate, and high-quality clinical documentation, significantly reducing time spent on administrative tasks. Integrated seamlessly into clinical workflows, NEVA empowers providers to deliver patient-centered care with greater ease and effectiveness.

Key Capabilities:
	•	Automated Clinical Documentation: Quickly converts patient interactions into structured clinical notes, accurately capturing patient history, clinical assessments, diagnoses, treatment plans, and follow-up instructions.
	•	Intelligent Data Extraction: Efficiently identifies and highlights critical patient details, supporting informed, evidence-based clinical decisions.
	•	Enhanced Team Collaboration: Streamlines communication among clinic staff, ensuring coordinated and consistent patient care management and timely task completion.
	•	Dermatology-Focused Accuracy: Consistently adheres to dermatological industry standards and clinical best practices, ensuring comprehensive, precise, and compliant documentation.

NEVA transforms dermatological care by streamlining documentation processes, enhancing clinical efficiency, and fostering improved patient outcomes.

01JVDXNA2H52Y1ZEPD7YV1Q3ST.name: My Job Interview Coach
01JVDXNA2H52Y1ZEPD7YV1Q3ST.description:
Boost your confidence and land your dream job with Omi Interview Coach – the ultimate interview analysis app. Dive deep into every answer and uncover hidden blind spots, nail your STAR stories, and fact-check your claims. Whether you’re preparing for behavioral or technical interviews, Omi gives you tailored, actionable feedback to sharpen both content and delivery.

Key Features
	•	AI-Powered Feedback: Get instant insights on your answers, from structure and clarity to depth and relevance.
	•	Blind-Spot Detector: Identify where you’re missing crucial STAR elements (Situation, Task, Action, Result) and learn how to fill the gaps.
	•	Fact-Check Assistant: Automatically flag inconsistencies in dates, figures, and project details so you speak with confidence and credibility.
	•	Delivery Analysis: Measure your pacing, tone, and filler-word usage (“um,” “like”) and receive personalized drills to polish your speaking style.
	•	Content Enhancement: Highlight your strongest stories, quantify achievements, and craft compelling narratives that resonate with recruiters.
	•	Actionable Action Plan: Follow a prioritized checklist of practice tasks—like refining key examples, rehearsing tough questions, and improving articulation.
	•	Secure Cloud Sync: Save your transcripts and feedback securely across devices; pick up right where you left off.
	•	Mock Interview Mode: Record live practice sessions, review AI-generated critiques, and track your improvement over time.

Why Omi Interview Coach?
Optimize your preparation for any role—software engineer, product manager, sales executive, and more. Omi leverages cutting-edge LLM technology to simulate the insights of a top interview coach, right in your pocket. Say goodbye to guesswork and hello to data-driven improvement.

How It Works
	1.	Record or Upload: Capture your mock interview audio or paste a written transcript.
	2.	Analyze: Let Omi dissect your performance—structure, substance, and style.
	3.	Learn & Iterate: Review your AI-driven report, complete targeted drills, then retake the questions to see real progress.

Perfect For
	•	Recent graduates preparing for campus placements
	•	Tech professionals practicing coding and system design interviews
	•	Executives honing leadership stories for C-suite roles
	•	Career-changers mastering new industry jargon and competencies

Start your path to interview mastery today. Download Omi Interview Coach now and transform every “uh” and “um” into an unforgettable aha moment!

01K1EAXBSGHS1JXZS8MKW8TGZ4.name: Omi Translate
01K1EAXBSGHS1JXZS8MKW8TGZ4.description: Omi Translate is your indispensable companion for breaking down language barriers in real-time. Seamlessly translate conversations and text on the fly, directly through your Omi device. Whether you're traveling, conducting international business, or simply learning a new language, Omi Translate ensures clear and effortless communication. Get instant translations, summarize multi-lingual discussions, and receive key insights, all powered by Omi's intelligent AI. Enhance your global interactions with accuracy and ease. Perfect for professionals, travelers, and language learners.

01K26NHMXEB6ZAXE09C01MA5WJ.name: FamilyMirror
01K26NHMXEB6ZAXE09C01MA5WJ.description:
FamilyMirror — See Your Conversations Clearly

FamilyMirror uses Virginia Satir’s model to analyze your conversations, uncover hidden dynamics, and show how each participant’s communication style affects the outcome.

Upload a transcript to:
	•	Identify roles like Blamer, Placater, or Leveler
	•	Reveal hidden emotions and needs
	•	Get actionable tips and ready-to-use I-statements
	•	Improve trust and harmony at home

FamilyMirror — understand each other, connect deeper.

01K6QSJR57F31Y99FPMB3B5RT1.name: Quick Sync
01K6QSJR57F31Y99FPMB3B5RT1.description:
This app is designed for everyday work conversations that don't fit a specific meeting format. It captures informal discussions, quick syncs, ad-hoc problem-solving sessions, and spontaneous work-related conversations in a flexible structure that adapts to whatever was actually discussed.

## Use this app when the transcript contains:
- Informal or unstructured work conversations between colleagues
- Quick syncs or check-ins without a formal agenda
- Ad-hoc problem-solving or troubleshooting discussions
- Spontaneous brainstorming or idea exploration about work topics
- Mixed work topics that don't follow a specific meeting pattern
- Casual updates or information sharing between team members
- Exploratory discussions about potential projects or ideas
- Quick decision-making conversations about work matters
- Follow-up discussions on ongoing work without formal structure
- Water cooler conversations that include work-related content

## Key indicators in transcript:
- No clear meeting agenda or structure, but work-focused
- Conversational, informal tone about professional matters
- Work topics emerge organically and may shift multiple times
- Quick decisions or clarifications about work
- Spontaneous idea generation related to projects or tasks
- No formal roles (presenter, facilitator, etc.)
- Natural back-and-forth dialogue about work matters
- May include tangents but stays work-relevant
- Could be 2+ people having an organic work conversation

## Do NOT use this app when:
- Meeting has a clear structure and predefined agenda (use Team Progress Meeting or 1:1 Meeting templates)
- Conversation is purely personal/social with no work content (use General Conversation)
- Formal presentation or demo being given
- Client-facing or sales conversations with clear objectives
- Interview or candidate screening
- Training or educational session with curriculum
- Performance review or evaluation

## App Best Suited For:
Hallway conversations, Slack huddles, quick Zoom calls, coffee chats with work discussion, spontaneous problem-solving sessions, casual team syncs, and any unstructured work-related conversation worth capturing.

01K8D357BHC9M3WSSVXF16987B.description:

details: https://devpost.com/software/the-rizzistant/
team name: the rizzistant

Voice Commands:
"start date": Starts the date/real-time analysis
"end date": Ends the date and creates post-date analysis
"edit code word <codeword>": Changes the code word
"edit phone number <phone number>: Changes your phone number
"<codeword>": Starts a phone call to your phone number

01K8FRZA3XV2T4N1VD9CMTW8HV.name: Rizz Meter
01K8FRZA3XV2T4N1VD9CMTW8HV.description:
💬 Rizz Meter for Dates — Real Conversations, Real Connection
Ever walked away from a date wondering how it really went?
Rizz Meter for Dates helps you grow—not by judging you, but by reflecting how you made the other person feel.
Using cutting-edge conversation analysis and a touch of AI intuition, Rizz Meter listens to the flow of your chat and turns it into insight you can feel good about. After each date, you’ll get a beautiful “Rizz Report” that celebrates your best moments and gently nudges you toward warmer, more balanced conversations.
✨ What It Does
Reciprocity & Flow: Measures how evenly you both share the floor—talking and listening in rhythm.
Attentiveness: Catches those magic follow-ups that show you remembered what they said and cared to ask more.
Warmth & Positivity: Detects appreciation, laughter, and kindness in your words, highlighting emotional openness.
Comfort & Pacing: Analyzes pauses and tone stability to sense if the conversation felt natural and unhurried.
Boundary Respect: Recognizes when you gracefully switch topics and respect a “no.”
Chemistry Index: Tracks how often your smiles, jokes, and energy aligned—when the vibe clicked.
💡 Your Post-Date Rizz Report
After each conversation, you’ll receive:
A Date Rizz Score out of 100
Sub-scores for warmth, attentiveness, reciprocity, comfort, and chemistry
2 personalized highlights celebrating what went great
2 gentle, practical tips to make your next date feel even better
Example:
“Date Rizz 78. Strong: balanced turns and genuine laughter. Try: longer pauses after jokes and echo their last story before switching topics.”
❤ Why It Matters
Because chemistry isn’t luck—it’s listening, warmth, and respect.
Rizz Meter for Dates helps you notice the small, human details that build trust and attraction, one conversation at a time.

01JEZC8MYAC69PH7QDC6HSMXN4.name: Audio Journal – Document Your Voice
01JEZC8MYAC69PH7QDC6HSMXN4.description:
Document your thoughts through audio memos, uncover insights and grow emotionally

This tool uses predefined markers (open, sesame, and close sesame) to extract insights from your audio transcription. It offers structured output that emphasizes clarity, categorization and psychological analysis, ideal for journaling and introspection

How to use it 
1. Say whatever you have in your mind without stopping 
2. If something clicks, you will annotate the following 

- capture your insight with verbal annotations using open and close sesames
- to categorize it, you can say “category” dash after open sesame  

For example, blah blah blah open sesame heath dash the first thing you do after waking up is to stretch your body on the bed close sesame blah blah blah open sesame work dash do things that quietly compounds without efforts close sesame blah blah blah 

Then the output would be
1. health - the first thing you do after waking up is to stretch your body on the bed

2. work - do things that quietly compounds without efforts

top-3-tasks-01JDJ7HTX3Z35HTXR6N29JKJC5.name: TOP 3 tasks
top-3-tasks-01JDJ7HTX3Z35HTXR6N29JKJC5.description:
Say "show my TOP 3 tasks" and receive a notification with the three most crucial tasks to crush today. No more feeling overwhelmed!

With TOP 3 Tasks, effortlessly manage your day by sharing your tasks and ideas with Omi as they come to you—anytime, anywhere. The app intelligently selects the most important tasks for you, ensuring that you focus on what truly matters. By concentrating on your TOP 3 tasks, you can conquer your day and then relax, knowing you've accomplished your most important goals.

This proven method keeps you productive, moving forward, and feeling accomplished, all without the risk of overwhelm, burnout, or analysis paralysis. Every morning, you'll receive three new tasks based on what you completed and any new priorities that have emerged, so you're always ready to tackle the day!

Tasks are created from your Omi memories automatically, from the moment of app installation, so memories before the app was installed won't be considered for tasks.

To update a task as completed, just say it to Omi, for example "I'm done with the marketing report". This won't change your list of 3 tasks for the day, but for following days this task won't appear anymore.

The top 3 tasks are updated at midnight, so you get new tasks every day.

nik-shevchenko.name: Nik Shevchenko
nik-shevchenko.description: Meet Nik Shevchenko, a globetrotting, dynamic entrepreneur with a knack for turning challenges into opportunities. From their humble beginnings on a small Russian island to joining the vibrant MIT community, Nik's journey is anything but ordinary. With over 40 countries under their belt, a third-time founder, and a penchant for innovation, Nik continues to redefine boundaries. Despite the whirlwind of their professional life, Nik treasures connections, from collaborating with a diverse range of colleagues to nurturing friendships worldwide. A spirited adventurer at heart, they navigate life with resilience, always chasing the next horizon.
